name: hitch-face
description: Desktop widget displaying animated robot face expressions matching Hitch events

scripts.build: npm run build:adapter && npm run build:app
scripts.build:app: cd app && zig build frontend-build && zig build
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:adapter && cd app && zig build package -Dpackage-target=macos -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:adapter && cd app && zig build package -Dpackage-target=windows -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:adapter && cd app && zig build package -Dpackage-target=linux -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.test: npm run build:adapter && node tests/app/extract-metadata.test.js && node tests/app/summarizer.test.js && node tests/app/power-button.test.js && node tests/extension/adapter.test.js && node tests/extension/install-extension.test.js
